title: Find my photos
surface: /explore — library-wide search + sport / category / jersey filters over the 20,829-photo library
summary: The athlete finds their own moments — search the live library by event, sport, or jersey.

strategy.decision: Find-my-photos is the product: discover the event → **find** (by jersey number / jersey color sightings, human-resolved) → download / share. No sales, no faces, no per-person naming.
strategy.why: Grounds in the pilot's real demand signal — athletes ask Nino mid-match *"did you get that?"* (`research/observations/find-my-photos-demand.md`). The find-me mechanism is `find_photos_by_jersey` over `photo_jersey_sightings`; the boundaries (no sales/faces/naming) are `decisions/0003`.
strategy.shipped: Live at `/explore` (`src/routes/explore/+page.svelte`): full-library caption search + Sport / Category / play_type / jersey filters over 20,829 captioned + embedded photos, ranked Best-Photos-First on `quality_score`.
strategy.gap: Jersey/color self-search exists as a *filter*; the pilot's "type your number → here you are" intent could be elevated from a filter dimension to a first-class find path (per `research/competitive/find-my-photos-delivery-platforms.md`).
strategy.question: What recall bar do athletes expect for "every photo of #7"? Needs the anchor-event walkthrough (`pilot_profile.concrete_reference`).

currentState.summary: Library-wide caption search + Sport / Category / play_type / jersey filters; quality-ranked grid over 20,829 photos.
currentState.annotation: The #10 ingest writes `photo_jersey_sightings` on every new album, so a new event is immediately findable-by-jersey — the pipeline behind this surface. The legacy enrich/sync chain that used to feed it was removed in the #10 cutover.
